ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Thompson appeared by zoom for Patricia Carlson.

The Court noted that nothing has happened since the letters were issued in Spring of 2019. Mr. Thompson requested a 60-day continuance to get the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution filed. Status on close of estate is continued to December 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
